title: Bonvoisin Postal Scale Digital 300kg/660lb Parcel Shipping Scale with Separate Large LCD Display, 4 AA Batteries & UK Power Adapter Included, kg/oz/lb Switchable, with Counting Function 36cmx30cm
features: EXTERNAL LCD DISPLAY - The display screen is connected to the postal scale with an extendable cable and can be easily mounted on the wall. There is therefore no need to struggle to find the readings when weighing large parcels. If you sell products online and post them, this parcel scale is a must have.

300KG/660LBS LARGE CAPACITY, 0.1KG/0.2OZ ACCURACY - This postage scale can weigh accurately up to 300 kg and meets most postal weighing requirements. Large capacity and weighing range switchable design make it perfect for weighing items of varying sizes from small boxes to bulky parcels.

KG/OZ/LB SWITCHABLE - The unit of the shipping scale can be converted from kg to lb, and oz. You can choose to weigh in imperial and metric units when posting items. It is useful for people who are not skilled in converting units to avoid conversion errors that could lead to incorrect postage calculations.

BATTERIES AND PLUG IN DUAL USE - The mail scale can be powered both by 4pcs 1.5V AA batteries and the mains adapter, which are both included. It can be plugged in when you want to save on batteries while it can work on batteries when there is no power nearby.

TARE, HOLD AND COUNTING FUNCTION - Besides tare function, this upgraded package scale has counting and hold functions. When you press “Tare”, it subtracts the weight of the container. And when you press “Hold”, it locks the reading. And it is also designed with counting function for weighing piles of parts.

WIDE APPLICATION - Perfect for home business, express, post office, warehouse, shipping, etc. Especially for parcel couriers or those who run e-commerce business, the postal scale is an indispensable partner for checking parcel weights.
